specs.title: GET /api/ping returns 204 @smoke
GET /api/version returns correct format @smoke
GET /api/novels returns list @smoke
POST /api/novels creates new project @smoke
POST /api/novels requires title @regression @negative
POST /api/novels rejects duplicate title @regression @boundary
DELETE /api/novels/:id removes project @regression
GET /api/chapters requires novelId @regression @negative
GET /api/chapters?novelId=xxx returns empty list initially @smoke
POST /api/chapters creates chapter @smoke
POST /api/chapters creates volume @smoke
GET /api/chapters/:id returns full chapter @regression
GET /api/chapters/:id returns 404 for non-existent @regression @negative
PUT /api/chapters/:id updates content @regression
PUT /api/chapters/:id updates title @regression
DELETE /api/chapters/:id removes chapter @regression
DELETE /api/chapters/:id removes volume @regression
POST /api/chapters handles empty body @regression @boundary
POST /api/chapters handles empty title @regression @boundary
POST /api/chapters handles missing title @regression @boundary
POST /continue requires text @regression @negative
POST /continue requires API key @regression @negative
POST /plot-suggestions requires text @regression @negative
POST /summarize requires text @regression @negative
POST /test-connection without key returns error gracefully @regression
POST /list-models requires provider @regression @negative
POST /preview without AI key works (pure prompt preview) @regression
POST /memory-status returns author info @regression

POST /api/import/document requires file upload @regression @negative
Unknown route returns 404 @regression
Malformed JSON body is handled gracefully @regression @boundary
章节可保存、拖入卷，并在重新进入后保持位置 @smoke
世界书、角色和 Prompt 按项目隔离并持久化 @regression
角色卡内嵌世界书提取后会保存到项目 @regression
会话可新建、保存、搜索并切换 @regression
Prompt 搜索、勾选删除和记忆预算控件有效 @regression
欢迎页可创建工作区，并在最近项目中重新打开 @smoke
欢迎页导入 TXT 会创建工作区并显示正文 @smoke
页面加载和工作区进入没有脚本错误或资源 404 @regression
900x600 窗口仍保留三栏编辑区 @regression
